codeReview.summary: The m1-domain-types feature is well-implemented with comprehensive type definitions that satisfy all requirements. The implementation uses readonly for immutability, discriminated unions for status types, and provides excellent test coverage.

summary: Feature m1-domain-types passes review. All core domain types (Mission, Feature, Task, Worker, ValidationContract, ValidationState) are properly defined with readonly immutability, discriminated union status types, and comprehensive test coverage (28 tests passing). The implementation aligns with project conventions and architecture patterns.
